title: Prophet Seasonality Workbench
summary: Build a seasonality-first workbench for business teams that need explainable forecast components, calendar effects, and action-ready summaries.
knowledge_base: Prophet Seasonality Workbench is positioned as a Business Forecasting starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Build a seasonality-first workbench for business teams that need explainable forecast components, calendar effects, and action-ready summaries.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on prophet, forecasting, business, analytics.

Production differentiation focus: Translate upstream business forecasting logic into stakeholder-ready dashboards, memos, and scenario controls.; Add reproducible docs, deployment-ready structure, and polished collateral for GitHub and LinkedIn.; Make the core decisions easier to interpret for product, finance, and operations partners.
why_high_score: Official or primary upstream repo with 20126 GitHub stars.
Active maintenance signal with recent push at 2026-04-08T06:18:48Z.
Tool for producing high quality forecasts for time series data that has multiple seasonality with linear or non-linear growth.
differentiation_hooks: Translate upstream business forecasting logic into stakeholder-ready dashboards, memos, and scenario controls.
Add reproducible docs, deployment-ready structure, and polished collateral for GitHub and LinkedIn.
Make the core decisions easier to interpret for product, finance, and operations partners.
